snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.nullableoptional.getuser(
    user_id="userId",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.nullableoptional.getuser(
        user_id="userId",
    )


asyncio.run(main())

snippet.sync_client:
import datetime

from seed import NotificationMethodZero, SearchResultZero, SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.nullableoptional.createcomplexprofile(
    id="id",
    nullable_role="ADMIN",
    nullable_status="active",
    nullable_notification=NotificationMethodZero(
        email_address="emailAddress",
        subject="subject",
        type="email",
    ),
    nullable_search_result=SearchResultZero(
        id="id",
        username="username",
        created_at=datetime.datetime.fromisoformat(
            "2024-01-15 09:30:00+00:00",
        ),
        type="user",
    ),
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio
import datetime

from seed import AsyncSeedApi, NotificationMethodZero, SearchResultZero

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.nullableoptional.createcomplexprofile(
        id="id",
        nullable_role="ADMIN",
        nullable_status="active",
        nullable_notification=NotificationMethodZero(
            email_address="emailAddress",
            subject="subject",
            type="email",
        ),
        nullable_search_result=SearchResultZero(
            id="id",
            username="username",
            created_at=datetime.datetime.fromisoformat(
                "2024-01-15 09:30:00+00:00",
            ),
            type="user",
        ),
    )


asyncio.run(main())

from seed import Address, NotificationMethodZero, SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.nullableoptional.testdeserialization(
    required_string="requiredString",
    nullable_enum="ADMIN",
    nullable_union=NotificationMethodZero(
        email_address="emailAddress",
        subject="subject",
        type="email",
    ),
    nullable_object=Address(
        street="street",
        zip_code="zipCode",
    ),
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import Address, AsyncSeedApi, NotificationMethodZero

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.nullableoptional.testdeserialization(
        required_string="requiredString",
        nullable_enum="ADMIN",
        nullable_union=NotificationMethodZero(
            email_address="emailAddress",
            subject="subject",
            type="email",
        ),
        nullable_object=Address(
            street="street",
            zip_code="zipCode",
        ),
    )


asyncio.run(main())
